title: Request to bump version of unzipper to eliminate license concerns
author: k0s15
body:
Unzipper itself has released latest version 0.11.2 which remove the dependency on buffers 
Can exceljs upgrade to use latest version of unzipper, so that we can eliminate the license concerns?

Link related on unzipper:
https://www.npmjs.com/package/unzipper
https://github.com/ZJONSSON/node-unzipper/pull/283

Post related on license concerns:
https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/2703
https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/pull/2687
https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/2686

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body:
Hi everyone,  
I’ve released  a version with PR [Request to bump version of unzipper to eliminate license concerns](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/pull/2744) as a pre-release version: `4.4.1-prerelease.0`.  

If no issues are reported with this version, I plan to officially release it as `4.4.1` soon.
